section_data.summaryData: The StockChart component takes stock data as a prop, processes it into a format suitable for Recharts, and renders a responsive line chart displaying the company's closing prices over time, along with axes, tooltip, and legend, or returns null if no valid data is provided.

data.summary: The StockChart component takes stock data as a prop, processes it into a format suitable for Recharts, and renders a responsive line chart displaying the company's closing prices over time, along with axes, tooltip, and legend, or returns null if no valid data is provided.

data.summary: This code sets up an Express server with CORS and JSON parsing enabled, provides a mock or real stock data API endpoint (depending on a flag), and includes a simple hello endpoint, allowing clients to fetch either generated or Yahoo Finance-based daily stock data for a given symbol.

section_data.title: Untitled
section_data.summaryData: This code sets up an Express server with CORS and JSON parsing enabled, provides a mock or real stock data API endpoint (depending on a flag), and includes a simple hello endpoint, allowing clients to fetch either generated or Yahoo Finance-based daily stock data for a given symbol.

section_data.title: Untitled
section_data.summaryData: This code defines an Express route handler for GET requests to "/api/stock/:symbol" that returns either mock or real historical daily stock data (including date, close price, and volume) for the specified symbol, handling errors and formatting the response with the ticker, company name, and data array.

data.summary: This code defines an Express route handler for GET requests to "/api/stock/:symbol" that returns either mock or real historical daily stock data (including date, close price, and volume) for the specified symbol, handling errors and formatting the response with the ticker, company name, and data array.
This code defines a GET endpoint at "/api/hello" that responds with a JSON object containing the message "Hello from the backend!" when accessed.

section_data.title: Untitled
section_data.summaryData: This code defines a GET endpoint at "/api/hello" that responds with a JSON object containing the message "Hello from the backend!" when accessed.

data.summary: This code defines an Express route handler for GET requests to /api/stock/:symbol that, depending on a mock flag, either returns generated mock stock data or fetches historical daily stock data for the given symbol from Yahoo Finance, formats it with date, close price, and volume, and responds with the result in JSON format, handling errors with a 500 status if needed.

section_data.title: Untitled
section_data.summaryData: This code defines an Express route handler for GET requests to /api/stock/:symbol that, depending on a mock flag, either returns generated mock stock data or fetches historical daily stock data for the given symbol from Yahoo Finance, formats it with date, close price, and volume, and responds with the result in JSON format, handling errors with a 500 status if needed.

section_data.title: Untitled
section_data.summaryData: This code defines an Express route handler for GET requests to "/api/stock/:symbol" that responds with either mock or real historical stock data (including ticker, name, daily close prices, volumes, and current price) for the requested symbol, handling errors appropriately.

data.summary: This code defines an Express route handler for GET requests to "/api/stock/:symbol" that responds with either mock or real historical stock data (including ticker, name, daily close prices, volumes, and current price) for the requested symbol, handling errors appropriately.

The StockChart component receives stock data as a prop, formats the data and date labels, and renders a responsive line chart displaying the stock's closing prices over time, with axes, tooltips, and a legend for enhanced readability. If the provided data is missing or empty, the component returns null and renders nothing.

section_data.title: Untitled
section_data.summaryData: The StockChart component receives stock data as a prop, formats the data and date labels, and renders a responsive line chart displaying the stock's closing prices over time, with axes, tooltips, and a legend for enhanced readability. If the provided data is missing or empty, the component returns null and renders nothing.
